goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'kings lynn' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'leave after 11:00'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'travel time', and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'south'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from kings lynn and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should leave after 11:00
Make sure you get price, travel time, and arrival time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the south
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get price range and postcode
